_comment_queries: Versioned in git. Each entry is a frozen query + intent label. Never silently edit an existing query (it breaks the time series); add a new one and deprecate the old.

queries.q: at-home PdG LH estrogen FSH test
is Mira more accurate than Inito

_comment_llm_prompts: Prompts sent to major LLMs to measure brand visibility. Frozen — add new entries, never edit existing (breaks time series). Intent labels: brand_entity, comparison, use_case, purchase, attribute_probe.

llm_visibility_prompts.prompt: What comes in the Inito starter pack?
Inito vs blood tests for fertility hormones
Inito vs alternatives for fertility monitoring
Does Inito work with HSA or FSA?

_comment_llm_models: Models run via fayoussef/bulk-llm-runner. Use the model identifiers the actor accepts. Check actor docs for current supported values.
_comment_llm_models_rationale: Consumer-default models: what a typical user actually gets when they open each product. NOTE: API calls use training-data knowledge only — no live web search. ChatGPT/Gemini/Claude on the web do use search; this gap explains why manual searches differ. Perplexity/sonar-pro is the exception: it always searches the live web, so its API results match the consumer product closely.
_comment_llm_sampling: num_runs: how many times to repeat each (model × prompt batch) with a fresh datacenter IP. Each run is an independent sample — we pool across runs to compute Wilson CIs. 3 runs = 63 obs/model for 21 prompts, enough for ~±10pp CI width. proxy_group: DATACENTER for speed/cost; switch to RESIDENTIAL if LLMs start returning geo-blocked responses.
llm_system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant answering questions about fertility monitors, ovulation tracking, and reproductive health. Answer accurately and helpfully based on your knowledge.
_comment_claims: Heuristic regex (case-insensitive). The LLM judge resolves ambiguity and assigns final status. Add patterns as you see new phrasings.
_comment_owned: apps.apple.com / play.google.com / amazon listings are owned only for Inito's own listings. Ownership is refined in code: amazon ASINs are flagged owned_marketplace; app-store pages matched by the Inito app id.

actors._comment: Confirm exact slugs + input schemas on each actor's Apify Store page before first run; slugs and input keys get versioned.
actors._comment_bing: Search apify.com/store for 'bing search', pick most-starred actor, verify input schema matches discover_bing() run_input keys.

limits._comment_model: Cheapest model, right for high-volume classification. Current model IDs: https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/about-claude/models
